Class RaceCar

java.lang.Object
RaceCar
public class RaceCar extends Object
This class represents a racecar as a record/object in the DMS. This allows it to store data about the object and is used when creating new entries or performing modifications of a racecar's data.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    RaceCar()
    Creates an empty race car object.
    RaceCar(int vehicleID, String make, String model, int year, double topSpeed, boolean hasLaunched)
    Creates an race car object with data.

  • Constructor Details

    • RaceCar

      public RaceCar()
      Creates an empty race car object.

    • RaceCar

      public RaceCar(int vehicleID, String make, String model, int year, double topSpeed, boolean hasLaunched)
      Creates an race car object with data.
      Parameters:
      vehicleID - Id of the race car
      make - The make of the race car
      model - The model of the race car
      year - The year that the race car was made
      topSpeed - The top speed of race car
      hasLaunched - The boolean value of whether the car has launched or not

  • Method Details

    • getVehicleID

      public int getVehicleID()
      This method gets the value VehicleID from a RaceCar object.
      Returns:
      int the id of the car

    • setVehicleID

      public void setVehicleID(int vehicleID)
      This method sets the value of vehicleID to the parameter.
      Parameters:
      vehicleID - the id of the car

    • getMake

      public String getMake()
      This method gets the value of make.
      Returns:
      String value of make

    • setMake

      public void setMake(String make)
      This method sets the value of make to the parameter.
      Parameters:
      make - the make of the car

    • getModel

      public String getModel()
      This method gets the value of model.
      Returns:
      String value of model

    • setModel

      public void setModel(String model)
      This method sets the value of model to the parameter.
      Parameters:
      model - the model of the car

    • getYear

      public int getYear()
      This method gets the value of year.
      Returns:
      int value of year

    • setYear

      public void setYear(int year)
      This method sets the value of year to the parameter.
      Parameters:
      year - the year the car was made

    • getTopSpeed

      public double getTopSpeed()
      This method gets the value of topSpeed.
      Returns:
      double speed represented in decimal format

    • setTopSpeed

      public void setTopSpeed(double topSpeed)
      This method sets the value of topSpeed to the parameter.
      Parameters:
      topSpeed - the top speed that the car can perform

    • isHasLaunched

      public String isHasLaunched()
      This method represents boolean field, hasLaunched, as a String for clarity to the user
      Returns:
      String launch status represented as string instead of boolean

    • boolHasLaunched

      public boolean boolHasLaunched()
      This method gets the value of hasLaunched
      Returns:
      boolean the boolean value of hasLaucnhed

    • setHasLaunched

      public void setHasLaunched(boolean hasLaunched)
      This method sets the value of hasLaunched to the parameter.
      Parameters:
      hasLaunched - the launch status of the car

    • toString

      public String toString()
      This method gives a custom string to display all race car information.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      String concatenated string with all fields of the object
